texto: ...Bud forth as the rose planted by the brooks of waters. Give ye a sweet odor as frankincense. Send forth flowers, as the lily...and bring forth leaves in grace, and praise with canticles, and bless the Lord in his works." —Ecclesiasticus 39:17-19
explicacao: Citação de Douai-Rheims Bible sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “...Bud forth as the rose planted by the brooks of waters. Give ye a sweet odor as frankincense. S…” articula trabalho, bible, scripture em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
